home.hero_description: Empower your consultations with clinical logic, precise calculations, and an experience your patients will love.
home.features_title: Everything you need in one place
home.features_subtitle: A complete platform for nutritionists who want to deliver more in less time.
home.feat_patients_desc: Complete registration, weight history, lab tests, and clinical evolution tracking.
home.feat_diet_desc: Create personalized meal plans in seconds based on the Brazilian food database.
home.feat_metabolic_desc: BMR, TDEE, and macro distribution calculated automatically by the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
home.feat_tags_desc: Diabetes, hypertension, CKD, and hepatic steatosis considered in each patient's plan.
home.feat_reports_desc: Patient distribution, diet activity, and timeline of generated plans.
home.feat_email_desc: Send meal plans directly to the patient with a record of each delivery.
home.how_title: From registration to plan in 3 steps
home.step_1_desc: Personal details, contact, profession, clinical information, and anthropometry in a guided flow.
home.step_2_desc: BMR and TDEE by the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, adjusted by activity level.
home.step_3_desc: Personalized meal plan ready to download in PDF or send by email.
home.portal_title: Your patients access their plan from anywhere
home.portal_desc: A dedicated area where patients log in and view their current meal plan — always updated, always at hand.
home.pricing_title: Choose the ideal plan for your practice
home.pricing_desc: Start for free and upgrade as your clinic grows. No contract, cancel anytime.
home.pricing_annual_discount: 2 months free on the annual plan
home.pricing_footnote: All plans include free updates and securely hosted data. Prices in Brazilian Real (BRL).
home.cta_desc: Join the nutritionists who are saving hours per consultation with Storm Nutrition.

login.patient_desc: Your meal plan in the palm of your hand.
login.patient_sub: Track your progress, access your recipes, and stay in touch with your nutritionist easily.
login.professional_sub: Validated metabolic calculations and meal plan generation in a few steps, all in one place.
login.login_patient_form_desc: Access your meal plan and schedule.
login.forgot_password_instruction: Enter your email above to receive the password recovery link.
login.forgot_password_success: We sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam).

register.title: Create your account
register.sub: Create your account and organize patients, calculations, and meal plans all in one place.
highlights: Metabolic calculations by Mifflin-St Jeor equation
Plan generation in a few steps
register.register_form_desc: Start your journey of clinical excellence.

dashboard.summary_subtitle: Here is your clinic summary today.
dashboard.performance_subtitle: Plans generated in the last 6 months
dashboard.performance_empty_desc: Generate your first plan to view your data
dashboard.recent_activity_empty: Your clinic activities will appear here as you register patients and generate plans.
dashboard.onboarding_desc: Start by registering your first patient to use all the platform features.
dashboard.onboarding_step_1_desc: Fill in clinical and anthropometric data.
dashboard.onboarding_step_2_desc: Create a personalized meal plan in minutes.
dashboard.onboarding_step_3_desc: The patient tracks the plan through the app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and platform preferences.
settings.password_desc: We will send a secure link to your email to reset the password.
settings.reset_password_success: We sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam).
settings.reset_password_error: Unable to send the link now. Try again in a few moments.
settings.clinic_brand_desc: Clinic data shown on exported plans.
settings.notifications_desc: Choose which events generate notifications in the system.
settings.privacy_desc: Manage your information according to privacy laws.
settings.export_data_desc: Download a file with all your registration data.
settings.privacy_policy_desc: See how your data is handled.

metabolic.time_to_goal_inconsistent: Calorie target inconsistent with weight goal.
metabolic.validate_calories_low: Warning: Daily calories below safe minimum (800 kcal).
metabolic.validate_calories_high: Warning: Daily calories very high (> 5000 kcal).
metabolic.validate_protein_low: Warning: Protein below recommended minimum (0.8g/kg). Current: {{current}}g/kg
metabolic.validate_protein_high: Warning: Protein above safe limit (2.5g/kg). Current: {{current}}g/kg
metabolic.title: Metabolic Calculator
metabolic.subtitle: BMR, TDEE, and BMI by the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
metabolic.bmr_desc: Energy for vital functions at rest.
metabolic.tdee_desc: Calories to maintain weight with your activity level.
metabolic.no_results_yet: Results will appear here after calculation.

diet.obs_hydration: Stay well hydrated throughout the day.
diet.obs_seasoning: Prefer natural seasonings such as garlic, onion, herbs, and spices.
diet.obs_sugary_drinks: Avoid consuming sugary drinks, such as soda and processed juices.
diet.obs_exercise: Practice physical activity regularly, as professionally guided.
diet.obs_chewing: Chew your food well and have your meals in a calm environment.
diet.log_exclude_ultraprocessed: Excluding ultra-processed foods (NOVA 4) from the plan
diet.log_diabetes_gi: Glycemic Control: Prioritizing low/medium GI (removing high GI ≥ 70)

email.diet_message: Hello, {{toName}}! Your meal plan ({{dietDate}}) is available. If you have any questions, I am at your disposal.

billing.title: Plan & Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, payment, and invoices.
billing.cancel_desc: You retain access to all features until the end of the paid period.
billing.cancel_confirm_message: Your subscription to the {{name}} plan will be canceled. You will continue to have access until {{date}} and no new charges will be made.
billing.change_confirm_message: You will switch to the {{name}} plan ({{price}}{{perMonth}}). The change will take effect immediately.
billing.notice_canceled: Subscription canceled. You retain access until the renewal date.
billing.notice_card_stripe: In production this opens the secure Stripe portal to change cards.
billing.notice_pdf_stripe: In production, the invoice PDF is downloaded from Stripe.

pdf.water_recommendation: Drink approximately {{liters}} liters of water per day.

patients.title: Patients
patients.subtitle: Manage your patients and track their progress.
patients.search_try_again: Try searching for another name or email.
patients.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}? All data and diets will be lost.

profile.error_load_desc: Please check your connection and try again. If the problem persists, the patient might have been removed.

timeline.patient_registered_desc: Initial profile created in the system.

biomarkers.title: Biomarker Evolution
biomarkers.insufficient_data: Insufficient exam history to generate evolution charts.

diets.compare_select_more: Select one more diet to compare
diets.compare_select_hint: Click a diet to select and compare it
diets.no_plans_desc: {{name}} does not have a plan yet.
diets.delete_confirm_msg: This action is permanent. The plan will be removed from history and cannot be recovered.
diets.error_delete: Could not delete the plan. Please try again.
diets.legacy_plan_desc: Plan generated with the old system version.

assessment.error_request: Could not send request. Please check your connection and try again.
assessment.error_save_settings: Could not save settings. Try again.
assessment.error_interval: Could not update interval. Try again.
assessment.title: Self-Evaluation Protocols
assessment.desc: Send guided measurement forms for the patient to fill out via the portal. Ideal for remote follow-up.
assessment.auto_scheduling_desc: Request evaluations periodically without manual intervention.
assessment.no_protocols: No protocols requested or completed for this patient.

compare.title: Comparative Analysis
compare.subtitle: Evolution of {{name}}
compare.date_comparison: Comparison by date: previous plan ({{prevDate}}) vs. current ({{currDate}}).
compare.clinical_advice_text: "When comparing diets, check if the redistribution of macronutrients is aligned with the latest lab exams, especially in cases of insulin resistance or dyslipidemia."

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Clinical metrics and performance.
reports.stats_desc: New patients registered in the last 6 months
reports.no_patients_data: No patients registered to display stats.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Manage your appointments and follow-ups.
calendar.delete_confirm_msg: This action is permanent. The appointment will be removed and cannot be recovered.

email_admin.title: Plan Delivery
email_admin.subtitle: Send meal plans by email and track delivery history.
email_admin.configure_alert_desc: set VITE_EMAILJS_* variables in .env.local (see .env.example) to dispatch real messages to patients.
email_admin.no_diets_alert: This patient has no saved diets.
email_admin.validation_error: Select a patient and a diet plan before continuing.
email_admin.send_error_not_configured: Email sending is not configured yet. Define VITE_EMAILJS_* variables in .env.local.
email_admin.send_error_failed: Failed to send email. Check patient email and connection, and try again.

diet_generator.title: Diet Generator
diet_generator.subtitle: Create complete and personalized meal plans in 3 steps.
diet_generator.on_behalf_of_patient: * These data were loaded from the patient profile. To change them, edit the patient registration.
diet_generator.generating_perfect_plan_desc: Please wait, our algorithm is building meals and calculating nutrients.
diet_generator.what_to_do_now: What do you want to do now?
diet_generator.fill_steps_desc: Fill in the steps and click "Generate Meal Plan".

goals.title: Goal Setting
goals.subtitle: Begin by defining the primary goal and weight targets for the patient.
goals.weight_warning: Warning: The target weight is equal to current. Consider changing the goal to "Weight Maintenance".
goals.special_obs_placeholder: E.g., lactose intolerance, vegetarian, nut allergy...

nutrition.title: Nutritional Information
nutrition.subtitle: Review automatic calculations and adjust nutritional targets as needed.

meal_plan.title: Meal Plan
meal_plan.subtitle: Define the meal structure and final details of the plan.
meal_plan.final_obs_placeholder: E.g., include iron-rich foods, avoid caffeine at night...

display.title: Plan Generated for {{name}}
display.validation_warning_desc: The sum of the meals ({{mealCal}} kcal) diverges from target ({{targetCal}} kcal). Adjust portions manually if needed.
display.drink_water: Drink approximately {{liters}} liters of water per day.

modes.general_desc: Focus on weight loss, maintenance or healthy weight gain.
modes.clinical_desc: For patients with hypertension, diabetes, renal or heart failure.
modes.performance_desc: Focus on sports nutrition, hypertrophy, and athletic yield.
modes.pediatric_desc: Focus on growth, food introduction, and childhood selectivity.
modes.recovery_desc: Caloric density for malnutrition or advanced muscle gain.

nutrition_label.title: Nutrition Facts
nutrition_label.footnote: * Percent Daily Values are based on a 2,000 calorie diet. Your daily values may be higher or lower depending on your calorie needs.

clinical_tags.title: Specific Clinical Conditions
clinical_tags.subtitle: Select conditions to activate automatic safety filters in the diet plan.

exams_module.title: Lab Exams (Optional)
exams_module.empty_desc: Add exams manually or use the suggestions above.

food_database.title: Food Database
food_database.subtitle: Consult the nutritional composition of Brazilian foods.

empty.title: No food found
empty.desc: Try adjusting your search or category filter.

adherence.error: Could not register adherence. Check your connection and try again.
adherence.not_followed_msg: Plan not followed. Tomorrow is a new day!
adherence.title: Today's Adherence
adherence.question: How was your adherence to the meal plan today?

self_eval.title: New Self-Evaluation
self_eval.subtitle: Requested by your nutritionist
self_eval.error: Could not submit the evaluation. Check your connection and try again.

patient_portal.advice_low_carb: This plan was calculated to target your Fat Burn goal through the exact balance of macronutrients.
patient_portal.advice_general: This plan was calculated to target your Performance and Health goals through the exact balance of macronutrients.

weight_modal.title: Log Current Weight
weight_modal.subtitle: Your nutritionist will track your progress.

change_password_modal.title: Change Password
change_password_modal.subtitle: Create a new secure password for your portal access.

errors.min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.recent_login: For security reasons, please sign out and sign back in to change your password.
errors.generic_error: Failed to update password. Try again later.

patient_form.discard_desc: You have filled in information that has not been saved yet. Keep a draft to continue later, or discard everything.

personal.title: Personal Data
personal.err_first_name: First name must have at least 2 characters.
personal.err_last_name: Last name must have at least 2 characters.
personal.err_dob_format: Date must be in DD/MM/YYYY format.
personal.err_dob_age: Patient must be at least 1 year old.

nutritional.title: Follow-up & Objectives
nutritional.subtitle: Define the patient's clinical profile and goals.
nutritional.medications_placeholder: List medications that the patient uses regularly...

anthropometric.title: Anthropometric Data
anthropometric.subtitle: Record measurements and data reliability.
anthropometric.veracity_desc: I confirm that the above information is the most accurate available at the moment.
anthropometric.err_height: Invalid height. Use a value between 0.10m and 3.00m.
anthropometric.terms_desc: I confirm that the information above is the most accurate available at this time.

exams.title: Lab Exams
exams.subtitle: Optional: input the most recent results for precise prescription.
exams.info_tip: Storm Nutrition uses these values to adjust micronutrient recommendations and suggest foods that help normalize parameters.

summary.title: Registration Summary
summary.subtitle: Please review all information before finalizing the registration.

export_diet.title: Export Meal Plan
export_diet.doc_pdf_desc: Editorial layout with your clinic's identity. Ideal for giving to the patient.
export_diet.screenshot_desc: Exports the plan exactly as you see it on the screen.
export_diet.error: Could not generate PDF. Please check your connection and try again.

patient_access.title: Patient Portal
patient_access.active_access_desc: This patient already has access to the portal. If they forgot the password, you can send a password reset email by clicking below:
patient_access.share_hint: Share these credentials with the patient securely.
patient_access.checkbox_send_email: Send invitation email automatically with credentials
patient_access.email_not_configured_hint: Email service not configured. Set up EmailJS in .env to enable.
patient_access.reset_existing_email_hint: You can trigger a password reset link for this email directly below:
patient_access.error_already_use: This email already has portal access. To generate a new password, use the reset option below.
patient_access.error_create_access: Could not create access. Check your connection and try again.
patient_access.error_reset_email: Could not send reset email. Check your settings.
patient_access.success_email_sent: ✓ An email with instructions and credentials has been sent to the patient!
patient_access.success_email_failed: ⚠️ The invitation email failed to send, but the access was created. Copy the credentials below.
patient_access.success_share: Share the credentials below with the patient.

patient_diet_history.confirm_delete_message: This action is permanent. The plan will be removed from history and cannot be recovered.
patient_diet_history.title: Diet History of {{name}}
patient_diet_history.empty_desc: This patient does not have any saved meal plans yet.
patient_diet_history.delete_error: Could not delete plan. Please check your connection and try again.

clinical_review.title: Final Clinical Review
clinical_review.subtitle: Nutritional validation pre-save
clinical_review.disclaimer: This plan was generated using the Storm Nutrition nutritional algorithm based on validated clinical guidelines. It is the nutritionist's duty to review and attest to the adequacy of the recommended foods to the patient's individual conditions.
